w:r.w:t: Complete technology reference for the Flowfiy AI outbound sales platform
Full-stack React framework (App Router, SSR, API routes)
Type safety across the whole codebase
Headless accessible components (dialogs, tabs, tooltips, etc.)
Runtime input validation on every API route
Powers all AI — lead research, ICP analysis, outreach copy, qualification scoring
The model used in the agentic orchestrator loop
BullMQ job queue backend + live pipeline log storage
Background job queue for lead generation and email sending
Redis client for BullMQ and job logs
Lead discovery — searches contacts by ICP filters
Web scraping — extracts company website content
Fetches scheduling link for email CTAs
Runs TypeScript worker files directly (no compile step in dev)
Multi-tenant SaaS — every resource is scoped to an organizationId
Centrally Managed AI — Flowfiy manages Claude via ANTHROPIC_API_KEY; Apollo, Apify, Gmail, Calendly credentials are user-supplied and encrypted at rest
App Router — server components for data fetching, client components for interactivity
Agentic worker — BullMQ job invokes a Claude tool-calling loop that autonomously discovers, researches, qualifies, and writes outreach for leads
